queries.sql: SELECT rsc.rsc_id, rsc.rsc_nom, rsc.rsc_jauge, res.res_id, res.res_date_debut, res.res_date_fin, -- Responsable (conducteur) (SELECT c.cpt_pseudo FROM t_inscription_isc i JOIN t_compte_cpt c ON c.cpt_id = i.cpt_id WHERE i.res_id = res.res_id AND i.isc_role = 'Conducteur' LIMIT 1) AS responsable, -- Participants (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(c2.cpt_pseudo SEPARATOR ', ') FROM t_inscription_isc i2 JOIN t_compte_cpt c2 ON c2.cpt_id = i2.cpt_id WHERE i2.res_id = res.res_id AND i2.isc_role = 'Passager' ) AS participants FROM t_ressource_rsc rsc LEFT JOIN t_reservation_res res ON rsc.rsc_id = res.rsc_id AND DATE(res.res_date_debut) = '2025-12-17' ORDER BY rsc.rsc_nom, res.res_date_debut

timelineData.name: Query
timelineData.query: SELECT rsc.rsc_id, rsc.rsc_nom, rsc.rsc_jauge, res.res_id, res.res_date_debut, res.res_date_fin, -- Responsable (conducteur) (SELECT c.cpt_pseudo FROM t_inscription_isc i JOIN t_compte_cpt c ON c.cpt_id = i.cpt_id WHERE i.res_id = res.res_id AND i.isc_role = 'Conducteur' LIMIT 1) AS responsable, -- Participants (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(c2.cpt_pseudo SEPARATOR ', ') FROM t_inscription_isc i2 JOIN t_compte_cpt c2 ON c2.cpt_id = i2.cpt_id WHERE i2.res_id = res.res_id AND i2.isc_role = 'Passager' ) AS participants FROM t_ressource_rsc rsc LEFT JOIN t_reservation_res res ON rsc.rsc_id = res.rsc_id AND DATE(res.res_date_debut) = '2025-12-17' ORDER BY rsc.rsc_nom, res.res_date_debut
